source_note: July 5, 2022 article described Republicans at 86% to win the House, so this row records Democrats as the eventual-winner side at 14%.
October 7, 2022 video described Republicans at around 70% to win the House.
November 2, 2022 article described Republicans with better than a 4-in-5 shot of winning the House; this fixture records Democrats at 19% and Republicans at 81%.
July 5, 2022 article described Republicans at 53% to take the Senate, so this row records Democrats as the eventual-winner side at 47%.
September 29, 2022 podcast post described Democrats at 68% to keep Senate control.
Election-eve summary described the Senate as a dead heat; this fixture encodes that as 50-50.
